3202770.name: Casino Box
3202770.description:
Welcome to Casino Box, a free multi-game front-end system, full of our classic casino games designed to be used in custom made cabinets by modders and makers with multi-monitor support. But the fun doesn’t stop there, it can also be enjoyed on a PC with 10 full casino games included! With customizable controls and the ability to use Mouse, keyboard, touch, USB encoders or even PlayStation and Xbox controllers. This initial version is only the beginning as we have many more cool casino games and customizability planned for future releases.

No Microtransactions & No Ads!

Who wouldn't want their own multi-game casino VTL at home!

With a built-in profile system, multiple players can enjoy playing all games, but not be forced to share credits. However, all players will contribute to the persistent progressive jackpots that anyone can win when spinning the bonus wheel! Level up your profile by playing, and gain experience towards earning rewards you can trade in for credits. You can even earn an extra spin on the bonus wheel, if you’re on a losing streak. All games are 100% fair, but it’s still a challenge and a gamble to win.

While playing you will earn prizes that can be traded for credits. You can even earn an extra spin on the bonus wheel if you hit a losing streak.

Casino Box offers 10 free games, Multiple Slots games, Blackjack, Keno, Baccarat, Poker and Roulette. With an option to help support development of even more casino games by purchasing the Suitera DLC. Suitera is a gambling card game we designed from scratch just for Casino Box, with many more great casino games waiting in our roadmap for future development.

Build your Own Casino Box or play on your PC!

Roadmap Items (DLC Purchase Supports this Development)

  • More Slots Games

  • Custom Slot Machine Maker

  • Horse / Dog Racing

  • Pachilso (Japanese Slots)

  • Bingo

  • Spot The Difference

  • Craps

  • Plinko-ish (Coin Drop)

  • Sic Bo

  • Pai Gow Poker

  • Texas Hold-Em

  • Coin Pusher

  • Scratch Cards

  • Hidden Object

  • Mini Games

Ideas

  • Add Your Own Games (Front-End)

  • Local Network Multiplayer Games

  • Online Progressive Jackpots
